debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
N : ℕ
hN : ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hmn : m ≥ n
M1 M2 : ℕ
M : ℕ := M1 + M2
hM1 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f n) a b N) M - ℓ n| < ε / 4
hM2 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f m) a b N) M - ℓ m| < ε / 4
hNn : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
hNm : |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
⊢ |ℓ m - ℓ n| ≤
    |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
      |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m|

proof:
calc
      |ℓ m - ℓ n| = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
                    (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        apply abs_add_le
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring
failed_attempts:
calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
         (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          apply le_trans (abs_sub_le _ _)
          apply add_le_add_right
          apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
          apply add_le_add_right
          apply abs_sub_le

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
         (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        repeat (apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); apply add_le_add_right)
        apply abs_add
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n|) := add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n|) := add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _) _
    _ = _ := by rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]; ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
         (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by
         congr 1; ring
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| +
         |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| := by
         apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
         apply add_le_add_right
         apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
         apply add_le_add_right
         apply abs_add_le
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m)]

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        repeat refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        exact abs_add _ _
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring

rw [show ℓ m - ℓ n = (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
      (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m) by ring]
    apply le_trans (abs_sub _ _)
    apply add_le_add
    · apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
      apply add_le_add
      · apply abs_sub_le
      · rfl
    · rfl

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
         (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| := by bound
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
      rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m)]
      ring
  linarith [b1, hM1, hNn, hNm, hM2]

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
        refine add_le_add_right (le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_) _
        exact add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
        ring
  linarith [b1, hM1, hM2, hNn, hNm]

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
        (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by bound
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
          ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n| ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n| := by
        rw [add_assoc]
        apply add_le_add_left
        apply abs_sub_le
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        rw [add_assoc]
        apply add_le_add_left
        apply abs_sub_le
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
          (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by
            congr 1; ring
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| := by bound
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
            rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m)]

rw [show ℓ m - ℓ n = (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
      (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m) by ring]
    bound

rw [show ℓ m - ℓ n = (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + 
      (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) by ring]
    refine le_trans (abs_add_le _ _) ?_
    refine add_le_add_right (le_trans (abs_add_le _ _) ?_) _
    refine add_le_add_right (add_le_add_right (abs_add_le _ _) _) _
    rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
    ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n| := by
        have := abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M) (ℓ n)
        linarith
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        have := abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M) (ℓ n)
        linarith
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
        (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by bound
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F _ _ _ _)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n| = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
        (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        refine le_trans (abs_sub_le _ _) ?_
        refine add_le_add ?_ le_rfl
        refine le_trans (abs_add_le _ _) ?_
        refine add_le_add (abs_sub_le _ _) le_rfl

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
         (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
         |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
           repeat apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
           repeat apply add_le_add_right
           apply le_refl
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
        ring

calc
      |ℓ m - ℓ n| = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
        (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by bound

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
          refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
          refine le_trans (add_le_add_left (abs_add _ _) _) ?_
          refine le_trans (add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_add _ _) _) _) ?_
          apply le_of_eq; ring
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
          ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
        rw [abs_neg, abs_neg]
        apply le_refl

rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
    calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n|) :=
      add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n|)) :=
      add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _) _
    _ = _ := by ring
successful_attempts:
calc
      |ℓ m - ℓ n| = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
          (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by ring

      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +

          rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m)]

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +

        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
        refine add_le_add ?_ (le_refl _)
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
        refine add_le_add (abs_add _ _) (le_refl _)
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
         (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        apply add_le_add_right
        apply abs_add
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m)]

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        exact abs_add _ _
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
        ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) + (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) +
         (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) + (ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| := by
      refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
      apply add_le_add_right
      refine le_trans (abs_add _ _) ?_
      apply add_le_add_right
      exact abs_add _ _
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
      rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
      rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M)]

rw [show ℓ m - ℓ n = (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n) - (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
      (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) - (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m) by ring]
    apply le_trans (abs_sub _ _)
    apply add_le_add_right
    apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
    apply add_le_add_right
    apply abs_sub

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n|) :=
      add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n|)) :=
      add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _) _
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
      rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]; ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by
        congr; ring
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
        repeat refine le_trans (abs_add_le _ _) (add_le_add_right ?_ _)
        apply le_refl
      _ = _ := by rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]; ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      _ = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
      _ ≤ |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
          (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M)| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_add_le _ _
      _ ≤ |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M)| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| :=
          add_le_add_right (abs_add_le _ _) _
      _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| :=
          add_le_add_right (add_le_add_right (abs_add_le _ _) _) _
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
          |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F _ _ _) (RiemannSum (f n) _ _ _)]
          ring

calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
      = |(ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M) +
         (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n)| := by ring
    _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| := by
      apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
      apply add_le_add_right
      apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
      apply add_le_add_right
      apply abs_add
    _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
      rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M)]
      rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
      ring
